ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HAYES, VIRGINIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WUNSH, MITCHELL WUNSH, SUPRIYA MOLINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAYES, VIRGINIA $114.56 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $194.56, DEFT. PROVIDED AN ACCOUNTING AND ACTED IN GOOD FAITH. TREBLE IS DENIED. EXHIBITS RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
